title: Momonosuke Becomes Shogun
description: On pages 23–25, this part focuses on Unknown person #22, Unknown person #23, Unknown person #24, Kid as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Gigot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: By the blue! He really did it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it! I thought if we hid that lamb side...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Yer kiddin' me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... that'd be enough to make him give up!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you mucked about with ingredients set to go to table...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... that- ending a customer's opportunity to have a meal, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: That there's a sin, boy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: c'mere. Let me show you just how big a one it is.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: PATTA PATTA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: What's he...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah! That's a blend of basil, pine nuts, and garlic.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once whisked into olive oil to make a pesto, it'll nicely ameliorate any of the mutton's funk.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's maintaining the meat in an onion and make mushroom paste too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their enzymes will tenderize the mutton, getting its texture close to that of lamb!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's adjusting his original recipe in just the right ways to account for the changes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: When did he learn such flexibility?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold it! There's no way anything a runt like you makes is good!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: The head chef doesn't hafta taste this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is this your gravy?! I'MMA taste it and let you know how bad...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: IT... IT'S AMAZING?!

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 21 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
